query: SELECT s.name, s.id, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON s.id = p.store_id GROUP BY s.name, s.id ORDER BY s.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.name, s.id, COUNT(p.id) as product_count FROM stores s LEFT JOIN products p ON s.id = p.store_id GROUP BY s.name, s.id ORDER BY s.name;
